expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: cross-section interaction audit catches template x pause-mode and prompt-editor-open states
expectations.evidence: In result.md, the output explicitly covers both required interaction pairs: it states the checkpoint focus is “Cross-Section Interaction Audit must catch gaps involving template × pause-mode and prompt-editor-open states,” and enumerates (1) “Template report with prompt using pause mode…” and (2) “Prompt editor open state… close-window confirmation behavior,” including mapping to BCIN-7730 and BCIN-7708/7709.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase5a
expectations.evidence: result.md is structured as a Phase 5a evaluation: it declares “Primary phase under test: Phase 5a,” cites the Phase 5a rubric authority (review-rubric-phase5a.md), and evaluates Phase 5a contract artifacts and the Phase 5a Cross-Section Interaction Audit gate. execution_notes.md also states it “Checked Phase 5a rubric requirements for Cross-Section Interaction Audit and acceptance gating.”
